title: PlayerKeepInventory
description: Each player can toggle if they want to keep their inventory and experience after death.
body:
If you got a server and want to let people decide if they want to keep their items and xp after death, than this is the right plugin for you. 
This Plugin adds one command:

- /keepinventory ***argument***

| ***argument***   | What the command does                                             |
|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
|(*default*) toggle |Toggles KeepInventory                                                  |
|true                          |Activates KeepInventory                                               |
|false                         |Disables KeepInventory                                                |
|check <player>      |Outputs if the player has enabled KeepInventory (OP required)   |
|default set true/false      |Set the default KeepInventory mode (OP required)   |
|default get      |Get the default KeepInventory mode (OP required)   |
|reload      |reload the KeepInventory config (OP required)   |

Each player can choose for them self. So if you have a server with some players wanting the gamerule keepinventory on and others that want it harder they can each play their way.
